name: percentdosegraph
description: A lightweight clinical dosing visualization tool for pharmacists and clinicians
author: Rafi

scripts.dev:full: concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run watch:web"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:web && npm run build:api
scripts.build:deploy: npm run build:all && cp frontend-react/app.bundle.js deploy/ && cp frontend-react/index.html deploy/ && cp frontend-react/styles.css deploy/
scripts.lint: echo 'Linting not yet configured - add ESLint'
scripts.test: echo 'Testing not yet configured - add Jest/Vitest'
scripts.precommit: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build:all
scripts.auto-build: npm run build:all && echo '✅ Auto-build completed successfully'
scripts.auto-deploy: npm run build:deploy && echo '🚀 Auto-deploy to /deploy folder completed'
